children.heading: Nonreviewability.—
children.label: 1 Nonreviewability.—
children.text: For nonreviewability of Tax Court decisions in small claims cases, see section 7463(b).

children.heading: Transcripts.—
children.label: 2 Transcripts.—
children.text: For authority of the Tax Court to fix fees for transcript of records, see section 7474.
